overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a cyberpunk urban plaza at night, dominated by the Fuyutsuki Electronics building with vibrant neon signage and holographic advertisements. Wet reflective pavement mirrors the colorful lights as pedestrians traverse the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk plaza that gradually narrows its focus toward the entrance of a corporate skyscraper. It begins by gliding through a wide commercial district where massive holographic billboards and the Fuyutsuki Electronics building cast vibrant reflections across the wet pavement. As the camera advances through a sparse crowd, a pedestrian in a yellow jacket enters the frame to sit on a bench, while the towering architecture on the right begins to dominate the view. The scene then shifts closer to the building's facade, passing an outdoor cafe area with white umbrellas as the open plaza recedes. Finally, the metal benches and palm trees fall behind to the left as the camera arrives at the immediate entrance of the Fuyutsuki Electronics building.
